versions.name: Camp Hunt
versions.summary: Crossroads of the West Council Scouts BSA resident camp on the west shore of Bear Lake in Rich County, north of Garden City. Aquatics-focused offerings include swimming, paddleboarding, kayaking, canoeing, rowing, and sailing, along with merit badges and advancement.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
